emails.subject: where are you???
emails.body: where are you??? Hey, lady, I just got back from eating on 2. I grabbed a table and looked for you the entire time, but didn't see you. Then I got your message. Where were you? Let's try it again soon. SBR x30569

emails.subject: RE: where are you???
emails.body: RE: where are you??? I am so sorry, a lesson on communication. I called and left a message and waited by the elevators. Lets try for Thurs or Fri? To: Perlingiere, Debra

emails.subject: RE: where are you???
emails.body: Sure. I guess you didn't get my email about getting a table. Well, I now have a phone, and hopefully you'll have one soon. Let's definitely shoot for Thursday. I may take Friday off if I get everything done this week. Sorry too! What do you think about Stacy's news???? To: Richardson, Stacey

emails.subject: RE: where are you???
emails.body: Thursday is good!!! my X 54593 To: Perlingiere, Debra
